title: Cobbler Containers GUI Pack
description: Cobbled Containers GUI Pack is a pack that utilizes a simple yet shiny style, coupled with the vanilla aesthetics of Minecraft to create a more immersive environment whilst using container blocks!
body:
Cobbler Containers GUI Pack changes textures for most containers in the game! This includes things like:

- Hoppers

- Beacons

- Crafting Tables

- Furnaces

- Enchantment Tables

- and much more!
